description_long: This object consists of two apples with a natural, rounded shape and a smooth, slightly glossy skin. The apples display a blend of red and yellow hues, with one apple showing a prominent bite mark that exposes the pale, moist interior flesh. Both apples have short, brown stems protruding from the top. The skin surface is mostly unblemished except for the bitten area, which reveals the fibrous, juicy inside. The coloration is mottled, with subtle gradients between red, yellow, and hints of green. The apples appear fresh and typical of those found in grocery stores or urban outdoor markets.
description: Two red-yellow apples, one with a visible bite exposing the pale interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing both apples, with the right apple displaying a large bite mark.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the bitten apple in the foreground and the intact apple behind.
description_view_2: Rear view of both apples, showing their unbroken, smooth skins and stems.
description_view_3: Top-down view focusing on the stems and the yellowish tops of both apples.
attribute_visible_damage_or_blemishes: one apple has a large bite mark
